continuity.arc_goal: Build unified Health SQLite database (health.db) with cross-pillar queries + complete read layer (health_query.py, cost_summary.py, health-query SKILL.md) so agent can answer 'how has my ApoB changed and what does Attia say about it' meaningfully via iMessage/BlueBubbles, with weekly Sunday email summaries and spend tracking.

progress_update.summary: We completed the full health intelligence read layer for health.db. Built health_query.py (3 subcommands: lab-trend, oura-window, search), cost_summary.py (session cost aggregator), and a health-query SKILL.md with 6 intents including weekly email summary and cron scheduling. Enabled Perplexity web search. Ran full SPECTRE cycle: execute → clean → test → push → evaluate → learn. 88 tests passing across 4 test files. All 5 commits pushed to origin/main.
progress_update.goal: Build health.db read layer: health_query.py (3 subcommands), cost_summary.py, health-query SKILL.md (6 intents), enable Perplexity web search, weekly Sunday email with LLM-synthesized Oura summary + spend tracking.
accomplished: Built health_query.py with lab-trend, oura-window, search subcommands — JSON stdout, FTS5 phrase-quoting, LIKE wildcard escaping, schema-driven metric validation
Built cost_summary.py — session JSONL cost aggregator with 3-tier path resolution (env var, host parents[2], container hardcoded)
Created health-query/SKILL.md with 6 intents: lab query, Oura query, knowledge search + web fallback, web contrast, weekly summary pipeline, weekly cron registration
Enabled Perplexity web search in openclaw.json; added health-query skill entry
Added raw_transcript column to health_knowledge table; wired through health_store, engine, on_demand
Ran /spectre:clean (removed 9 lines dead code), /spectre:test (closed coverage gaps), pushed 5 commits to origin/main
Captured 2 new SPECTRE skills: patterns-openclaw-exec-scripts (new), patterns-sqlite-fts5-python v2 (FTS5 user input safety + LIKE escaping)
progress_update.now: Session complete. Agent restarted with new skill and Perplexity config active. Ready for live iMessage testing.
next_steps: Test health-query skill live via iMessage: lab query (ferritin trend), Oura query (last week sleep), knowledge search (HRV), weekly summary on-demand
Schedule weekly summary cron via iMessage: 'set up my weekly summary'
Next scope candidates: DB migration runner (PRAGMA user_version), events/interventions table, bulk Attia/Huberman podcast ingestion, daily SQLite backup cron
Architecture review from /spectre:evaluate still running in background — check docs/tasks/main/reviews/ for output
constraints: health_query.py runs inside agent container — paths must be container-relative (/home/openclaw/.openclaw/workspace/health/)
Python 3 only, no new pip deps beyond stdlib + sqlite3
health.db at workspace/health/health.db — imported via sys.path.insert
Perplexity already configured in openclaw.json, now enabled: true
Weekly summary email via send-email.sh (SMTP_FROM_EMAIL + GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD in .env)
BlueBubbles is sole active channel — Telegram disabled (config preserved)
All planning docs in ~/Code Projects/Health DB/ — NOT in ironclaw repo docs/tasks/
decisions: Routing logic in SKILL.md not health_query.py — agent has conversational context for follow-up contrast flow
Email body via temp file write (/tmp/health_weekly.txt), not stdin piping — exec tool may not support stdin
FTS5 user input phrase-quoted (_fts_quote) to prevent operator injection; LIKE wildcards escaped with ESCAPE clause
Weekly summary cron task wording matches Intent 5 triggers exactly so cron re-entry routes correctly
risks: Knowledge coverage gap: only ~12 episodes indexed; bulk Attia/Huberman/Rhonda ingestion is backlog
cost_summary.py mtime-based filtering is an approximation — sessions that span midnight may be miscounted
Architecture review result not yet available (background agent)

context.session_arc: 6-session sprint on health-db + health_query (Apr 26-27). S1 scoped health-db, S2 implemented phases 1-3 (SQLite, blood labs, Oura), S3 wrote tests + /spectre:clean, S4 ran clean/test/evaluate, fixed 3 architecture issues, pushed, disabled Telegram. S5 scoped health_query.py (3 subcommands, 6 intents), shipped raw_transcript storage. S6 executed health_query.py: built all 3 subcommands, cost_summary.py, health-query SKILL.md, enabled Perplexity, 88 tests passing, pushed 5 commits. Ready for live iMessage testing.
